title: Mace Protection
description: Armor enchantment to reduce damage from Mace attacks - Compatible with any type of protection
body:
![mace protection datapack/mod title image minecraft](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/titles/mace_protection.png)
[![jodeks datapacks discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6)   [![datapacks jodek youtube](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/YouTube.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@jodek)   [![mace protection minecraft datapack github issues](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Issues.png)](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/mace-protection/issues)   [![jodeks datapacks kofi](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Kofi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jodek)   [![github sponsor jodek](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Sponsor.png)](https://github.com/sponsors/Jodekq)
### Adds the "Mace Protection" Enchantment Each level reduces the mace smash damage by 4% per armor piece - Mace Protection I: 4% per armor piece - Mace Protection II: 8% per armor piece - Mace Protection III: 12% per armor piece - Mace Protection IV: 16% per armor piece **How to obtain:** - Has a 8% chance to get it from ominous vaults **How to use:** - can be put on helmets, chestplates, leggings and boots - Is compatible with any vanilla type of protection - Is compatible with my "Spear Protection" Enchantment (Upcoming datapack)
